basic_details.job_title: CMHO Bijapur – Staff Nurse, Support staff and More – 33 Posts
basic_details.short_information: Chief Medical and Health Office Bijapur (CMHO Bijapur) Recruitment 2026 for 33 posts of Various Contractual. Candidates with BDS, BHMS/BAMS/BUMS, B.Sc, GNM, 12th, Diploma Can Apply Online. The online application opens on 28-05-2026, and closes on 18-06-2026. The candidate shall apply online through CMHO Bijapur official website bijapur.gov.in.

qualification.education_qualification: BDS, BPT, BHMS/BAMS/BUMS, DMLT/BMLT, B.Sc. Nursing, Post Basic Nursing, BSC Nursing, GNM, 12th Pass with Diploma in Computer Application, Graduation with Diploma in Computer Application, PG Degree/Diploma in Psychology/Counseling/Health Education/Mass Communication/Social Science, Post-Graduate in Social Work/Sociology/Psychology/Anthropology/Human Development, DHLS, DTYDHH, BSc Home Science, 8th Pass

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the CMHO Bijapur Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
seo_tags: CMHO Bijapur Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 33 Staff Nurse, Support staff and More Posts
